---
title: "HW5(1)"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Loading Libraries


```library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
library(mapdata)
library(dplyr)
```

## Getting Appropriate dataframes

```
us <- map_data('state')
cali <- us %>%
  filter(region == "california")
```

## Generate Base Map of California

```
ggplot(data = cali, aes(x=long, y=lat), group = group) + 
  geom_polygon(fill = 'blue', color = 'white') + 
  coord_fixed(1.3)
```

## Load all the rda file that has the wind turbine points
```
load("/Users/neilangra/Desktop/Rscripts/wind_turbines.rda")
ls()
new <- states %>%
  filter(region == "california")
```

## Add those points to the map
```
ggplot(data = cali, aes(x=long, y=lat), group = group) + 
  geom_polygon(fill = 'blue', color = 'white') + 
  coord_fixed(1.3) + 
  geom_point(data = new, aes(x=long, y=lat, group =group), color = 'red', size = .5, alpha = .5)

```
